name: youtube-transcribe
title: YouTube Transcribe
description: Find and extract transcripts from YouTube videos.
author: caasols

preferences.name: autoSummarize
preferences.title: Auto-Summarize on Fetch
preferences.description: Automatically generate an AI summary in the background whenever a new transcript is fetched.
preferences.label: Summarize new transcripts automatically

preferences.name: defaultAIAction
preferences.title: Default AI Action
preferences.description: Choose which AI action is triggered by default when pressing Enter on a transcript.

preferences.name: summarizePromptTemplate
preferences.title: Summarize Prompt Template
preferences.description: Custom prompt template for transcript summaries. Supported variables: {{title}}, {{url}}, {{transcript}}
preferences.default:
You are creating a concise, structured summary of a YouTube video based only on its transcript.

Use this structure:

### Summary
Write a brief, clear summary that captures the core message of the video.

### Analogy
Write a short, insightful analogy that relates the main idea to a familiar everyday-life situation.

### Notes
- List the most important 20% of ideas that explain 80% of the video's value.
- Keep the bullets practical and high signal.

### Keywords
- Identify the most important terms, complex words, or acronyms from the transcript.
- For each, provide a short, simple explanation based on how it is used in the video.

Constraints:
- Do not invent facts that are not supported by the transcript.
- Keep the entire response under 330 words.
- Be concise and information-dense.
- Use the following source material:

Title: {{title}}
URL: {{url}}
Transcript:
{{transcript}}

preferences.name: historyLimit
preferences.title: History Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of transcript entries to keep in history.

preferences.name: aiResponseLanguage
preferences.title: AI Response Language
preferences.description: Language for AI summaries and answers. Uses the transcript's language by default.

preferences.name: aiModel
preferences.title: AI Model
preferences.description: Choose which AI model to use for summaries and questions.

preferences.name: customAction1Name
preferences.title: Custom AI Action 1 — Name
preferences.description: Display name for the first custom AI action (e.g., "Extract Key Quotes"). Leave empty to disable.

preferences.name: customAction1Prompt
preferences.title: Custom AI Action 1 — Prompt
preferences.description: Prompt template for the first custom AI action. Supports: {{title}}, {{url}}, {{channel}}, {{transcript}}, {{language}}, {{tags}}, {{duration}}, {{contentKind}}

preferences.name: customAction2Name
preferences.title: Custom AI Action 2 — Name
preferences.description: Display name for the second custom AI action (e.g., "Extract Action Items"). Leave empty to disable.

preferences.name: customAction2Prompt
preferences.title: Custom AI Action 2 — Prompt
preferences.description: Prompt template for the second custom AI action. Supports: {{title}}, {{url}}, {{channel}}, {{transcript}}, {{language}}, {{tags}}, {{duration}}, {{contentKind}}

preferences.name: historySortOrder
preferences.title: History Sort Order
preferences.description: Choose how transcript history is sorted.

preferences.name: aiChatMaxAgeDays
preferences.title: AI Chat Max Age
preferences.description: Automatically remove cached AI summaries and answers older than this.

preferences.name: historyMaxAgeDays
preferences.title: History Max Age
preferences.description: Automatically remove entries older than this. Set to 'Unlimited' to keep all entries.

commands.name: get-youtube-transcript
commands.title: Transcribe YouTube Video
commands.subtitle: YouTube Transcribe
commands.description: Fetch, browse, and export a transcript from a YouTube video

arguments.name: language
arguments.placeholder: Language code, e.g. en, pt, es (optional)

commands.title: View Transcript History
commands.subtitle: YouTube Transcribe
commands.description: Browse all previously fetched YouTube transcripts

commands.name: search-ai-chats
commands.title: Search AI Chats
commands.subtitle: YouTube Transcribe
commands.description: Search across all AI summaries and answers from transcript history

commands.description: Internal background worker for transcript fetching
